name: emi-challenge
description: Emi React Challenge — recruiter dashboard for screened candidates

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
